summary: Frontend-only regression test for bottom-tab bar fix. Verified the two stray tabs ('legal' and 'help-support') are no longer present in either driver or shipper bottom navigation, and that the Settings -> Help & Support / Privacy & Terms links still navigate correctly to /help-support and /legal for both roles. All 3 acceptance criteria pass.
verification_of_fix: Confirmed app/_layout.tsx (lines 200-201) registers help-support and legal as hidden Tabs.Screen with href:null and tabBarStyle.display:none. UI confirms only the role-specific tabs render.
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing (not part of this fix): console error 'The action REPLACE with payload {name:driver-home} was not handled by any navigator' on initial driver login. Navigation still completes successfully because expo-router resolves the route after the tab tree mounts, but this REPLACE-before-mount warning is noisy and should be investigated by main agent (likely fixable by routing via /driver-home only after auth state hydrates).
Pre-existing (not part of this fix): WebSocket /ws/driver/<id> handshake returns 502 (preview ingress likely not forwarding ws). Not related to nav fix.
seed_data_creation: Triggered POST /api/seed-demo before login to ensure demo accounts exist (idempotent; 0 created this run -- already seeded).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for stray tabs in bottom nav is fully verified on mobile viewport (390x844). Both driver and shipper bottom bars now show exactly the intended tabs, and Help & Support / Privacy & Terms remain reachable from Settings. No regressions introduced. Two unrelated pre-existing console noises observed (REPLACE-driver-home navigator warning and /ws 502) and reported under critical_code_review_comments for awareness.
